tools.name: extract
tools.description: URL -> clean structured data: title, description, text, ALL JSON-LD, OpenGraph/Twitter meta, headings, links, AI-readiness signals.

tools.name: read
tools.description: URL -> full page content as clean Markdown, ready for LLM context. Strips nav/ads/scripts, preserves headings/links/lists.

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Static supply-chain security scan of a public GitHub repo before an agent installs/runs it. Flags exfil sinks, obfuscation, credential reads, install-time curl|bash. risk=clean|suspicious|dangerous.

tools.name: schemaforge
tools.description: Generate a complete, paste-ready JSON-LD structured-data bundle (LocalBusiness/MedicalBusiness + Service/OfferCatalog + FAQPage + Review/AggregateRating + geo/hours) for a business site, tuned to the fields the pages that surface for high-intent vertical queries carry, plus a gap diff vs the live si

tools.name: enrich
tools.description: Domain -> agent-ready company intelligence in one call: identity (name/legal name/description/logo), industry keywords, tech stack (CMS/framework/analytics), social profiles, contact surface (emails/phone/address), DNS + email infrastructure (MX/SPF/DMARC), and AI-search-readiness signals. No auth,

tools.name: wallet_enrich
tools.description: Base/EVM address -> agent-ready on-chain profile in one call: EOA vs contract, native ETH + curated Base token holdings, token/NFT contract metadata (ERC-20/721/1155, name/symbol/decimals/supply), EIP-1967 proxy detection, activity (outbound tx count), and a single derived profile label. Pure Base-m

tools.name: deep_audit
tools.description: Domain -> ONE complete AI-search-readiness audit: firmographics + tech stack + contact + DNS/email infra + a 0-100 AI-readiness score, PLUS a structured-data gap analysis with a paste-ready JSON-LD fix list and a combined letter grade. The bundled deep tier (enrich + schemaforge in one call). No aut

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: read, schemaforge, enrich, deep_audit · Private data: scan, enrich, wallet_enrich, deep_audit · Public sink: enrich, deep_audit.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: read, schemaforge, enrich, deep_audit · Private data: scan, enrich, wallet_enrich, deep_audit · Public sink: enrich, deep_audit

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
